heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 701f Authorization of appropriations
text: The sum of $310,000,000 is authorized to be appropriated for carrying out the improvements herein and the sum of $10,000,000 is authorized to be appropriated and expended in equal amounts by the Departments of the Army and Agriculture for carrying out any examinations and surveys provided for in this Act and other Acts of Congress.
notes: References in Text“Herein”, and “this Act”, referred to in text, means , , popularly known as the Flood Control Act of , which to the extent classified to the Code enacted sections 701a, 701b, 701c, 701d to 701f, and 701h of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables. Portions of section 5 of act , enumerating certain improvements with regard to flood control, and sections 6 and 7 of that act, relating to examinations and surveys, were not classified to the Code.act June 22, 1936, ch. 68849 Stat. 1570June 22, 1936June 22, 1936

CodificationThe first proviso, relating to a limitation upon the amount of expenditure during the fiscal year 1937, was deleted as executed and obsolete. The second proviso, relating to payment from funds available to the Works Progress Administration, was also omitted as executed and obsolete. The Works Progress Administration was renamed the Work Projects Administration by Reorg. Plan No. 1 of 1939, § 306, eff. , 4 F.R. 2727, , set out in the Appendix to Title 5, Government Organization and Employees. Liquidation was ordered by President’s letter of , and appropriations for it authorized by , .July 1, 1939December 4, 194253 Stat. 1423act July 12, 1943, ch. 229, title I57 Stat. 540

Change of NameDepartment of War designated Department of the Army and title of Secretary of War changed to Secretary of the Army by section 205(a) of , . Section 205(a) of act , was repealed by section 53 of , . Section 1 of act , enacted “Title 10, Armed Forces” which in sections 3010 to 3013 continued Department of the Army under administrative supervision of Secretary of the Army.act July 26, 1947, ch. 343, title II61 Stat. 501act Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 104170A Stat. 641July 26, 1947Aug. 10, 1956
